name: lovable-to-app-store
description: Ship Lovable apps to iOS TestFlight and Google Play. Wraps apps in Capacitor, registers services (RevenueCat, OneSignal), builds, and submits — with zero app store knowledge required. Includes native Google/Apple Sign-In via Supabase Edge Functions, automatic OTA updates via the Lovable URL, and an optional Capgo path for bundled deployments.
